reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Technology - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Marvellous faculty, Good for placements.

review_content.Placements: The percentage of students placed was good and better, with the total number of students expected to be placed soon on campus. The top recruiting companies for our course are IBM, AMAZON, GENPACT. The top roles offered in my course are test engineer and data analyst. The package will be around 2LPA to 5LPA. Around 75% of students go through an internship at Genpact when they are in the final year.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure are so good and amazing; the view of the campus attracts the students. Coming to the facilities, there is fast free Wi-Fi available in the campus, and labs are equipped with digital classes and a good library. The facilities in the hostel are good; the food is delicious, and the canteen offers good snacks. There is 24/7 medical facilities available, and sports are available both indoors and outdoors.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Technology - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Our college has a good environment.

review_content.Placements: I am pursuing computer science here. The placements in our college are very low. Infosys, TCS and other MNCs come here to recruit students with a minimum of 60% in academics. Our college students will get a maximum of 3.5 LPA in campus recruitment.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has very slow computers, but Wi-Fi is good. We have a good ground. Sports competitions are good. We have a canteen with average food, but it is very expensive. Our college offers pharmacy, engineering, degree and post-graduation.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Technology - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Good lab facilities in our stream Good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: 75% of students were placed. 25000 the highest package offered, 10000 the lowest package offered. TCS top recruiting company. 12% of students got internship in our course. Auto cad top course offered in our course. Top roles offered in our course .
review_content.Infrastructure: Labs facilities concrete technology lab soil mechanics lab Fluid mechanics laboratory ventilated classrooms Spacious library Good facilities in the hostel good maintainence, medical facilities football, and National cadet cabinet.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Technology - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: The faculty is very good if you want to learn a subject, but there are no placements in 2025.

review_content.Placements: The students taken by our college are those who have passed the intermediate without any specific marks, but there will be fee reimbursement for those who secured good marks. During my four years, no recruiting company other than Genpact has come, and almost no one got a placement. All courses are available in our college, including degree, B.Tech, M.Tech and PhD.
review_content.Infrastructure: Everything is available in our college, including Wi-Fi, computer labs, library and classrooms with digital screens and projectors. The hostel is very well-equipped with all kinds of necessary things that a student should have. There is no canteen in the hostel, but we have a canteen in college, and there are no sports in the hostel, but we have a ground in our college play, and NCC is available, which has good progress for students who join.

highlights.summary: The OJEE 2026 registration process has begun for Krupajal Engineering College admission to BTech, BPharma, MBA, and MCA programmes. The final date to register is Mar 22, 2026. Additionally, the exam dates are tentatively scheduled for May 4 and May 5, 2026, and from May 7 to May 9, 2026.

faqs.question: How can I get into Krupajal Engineering College for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
Krupajal Engineering College has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:
Courses Eligibility
B.E. / B.Tech Candidate must have passed 10+2 examination with any three subjects out of 14 subjects (Physics/ Mathematics / Chemistry/ Computer Science/ Electronics/ Information Technology/ Biology/ Informatics Practices/ Biotechnology/Technical Vocational subject/ Agriculture/ Engineering Graphics/ Business Studies/ Entrepreneurship) and obtained at least 45% marks for general (40% marks for in case of candidates belonging to reserved category) in the above subjects taken together.
M.E./M.Tech Candidate must have completed Bachelor degree or equivalent in the relevant field of engineering and technology with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute. 45% marks in case of candidates belonging to reserved category.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Technology - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, college was good.

review_content.Placements: 1. About 70% of students placed in my course 2. The highest package was INR 6.7 LPA, the lowest was INR 2.5 LPA, and the average was INR 4.5 LPA. 3. TATA Steel, TCS, Infosis, Hindalco, and JSW are the top recruiting companies. 4. About 60% of students got internships at TCS and Infosys. 5. B.Tech, M.Tech, MBA, Diploma, MCA, BBA, M.Sc are the courses offered here.
review_content.Infrastructure: The library was pretty good; classrooms are clean, and labs are well furnished. The hostel was average, the food was below average in the mess, the medical facility is only available in college, and sports and games are regular. My college needs to repair hostel rooms, like fans and lights in some rooms.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Technology - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: It is value for money and location wise it is good near NH.

review_content.Placements: I am second year college student in CSE. Placement wise the college is average. You can apply for On and Off campus placements. I do not know more about placement. College is value for money you can go ahead. You can apply for internship outside.
review_content.Infrastructure: Labs and classrooms are so good, but wifi is not available, Hostel facility is average but not so good, you can live outside with friends like PG. Most of the students are living outside with friends.
review_content.Faculty: Teaching is good in our college. College is affiliated by BPUT. Curriculum is the same as BPUT syllabus. Pass percentage is high and syllabus is not hard. You can easily score in your semester and internals. Exams happen every 6 months. We have semesters and internal.

overview_faqs.question: Is Computer Engineering a good choice for career?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, CSE (full form Computer Science and Engineering) is a good career choice if you are aspiring for a good salary package as a fresher. A Computer Engineering graduate's average salary in India is approx. INR 6 lakh and higher. Also, owing to the exponential rise in AI & ML concept), CSE course gradutes have got a competitive job market and abundant opportunities for career growth.

review_summary.college_name: Sir Vishveshwaraiah Institute Of Science And Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely good for the batch starting from 2024 because the college is highly developed now.

content.Placements: 75% of students were placed in our college. The highest package was 6 LPA, and the lowest package was 2.75 LPA. Tech Mahindra is the top recruiter. 100% of students got internship opportunities. Moreover, CNC machine operator and mechanics of the vehicle are the top roles offered. But we need to build knowledge as per our subjects.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities were highly technological and had fewer members in the classrooms, all of which were better, and the lab had all of the necessary equipment. Currently, the boys hostel was not there when I was studying and there was good food in the canteen. Now there are two canteens and one general store on the college campus, that makes it easy for the students to get things .

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college in all formats for engineering.

content.Placements: In our college, every year placements are conducted. Students will participate every time. About 89% of students will get selected for campus placements. The highest salary package offered during placements is 10 LPA and the lowest salary package offered is 4 LPA. Selected students got roles such as data scientist, software developer, trainee, and data analyst.
content.Infrastructure: In our college, good infrastructure construction is done. Labs have good machinery that is helpful for students to do experiments. Digital classrooms and libraries are available in our college. There is a playground in our college to play sports. This college hostel is also available with good beds and is well-maintained. There is a canteen with medical facilites in our college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides good faculty.

content.Placements: More than 70% of students with good communication skills were placed. The highest salary package is 7 LPA, the lowest salary package is 3 LPA, and the average salary package is 5 LPA. Companies like Accenture, TCS, and Google are the top recruiting companies. More than 80% of students got internships at HCL.
content.Infrastructure: College has better facilities and infrastructure with unlimited Wi-Fi. There is a computerised library with several labs. Hostel is good with good food and medical facilities with a specialised doctor. Outdoor games are available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: College is very good to study in computer science and engineering course it is a certified college.

content.Placements: In our college, about 75% of students placed in our course. The highest salary package offered is 8 LPA, the lowest salary package offered is 4 LPA, and the average salary package offered is 6 LPA. Capgemini, Tech Mahindra, TCS, and Accenture are the most recruited companies. About 40% of students got internships in Tech Mahindra and TCS. HR, developer, tester, and programmer are the top roles offered.
content.Infrastructure: Our college infrastructure is a very pleasant and a good place having peace everywhere. Good quality bedrooms and quality food is served in mess. In our college, numerous games are played weekly twice in the evening. In our college, sports are brilliant.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with its faculty members and management.

content.Placements: They prefer students to get a job in a good IT industry. But there was no MNC on-campus facility for engineering students, and faculty members will share the KT with all students to gain subject knowledge and preferred to attend the off-campus interviews in the competition world.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure for course and facilities was good, but the development was still ongoing and the education environment was filled with full of joy and interest. The sports were good to play with faculty members and colleagues. They provided medical facilities, and the canteen was available and good.

reviews.review_text: They have a good computer lab with 100+ computers. This is one of the best computer labs in Nellore. reviews.review_heading: Review of Krishna Chaitanya Institute Of Technology And Sciences.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of every course is different. The hostel and canteen provide food. The campus provides facilities like Wi-Fi, medical facilities, good sports, and games.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because the faculty is very friendly in the classroom.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good compared to other local colleges. The college provides free Wi-Fi to students for systems and classrooms for digital projecting. The quality of the hostel is better than that of other colleges.

reviews.review_heading: A good atmosphere adds to study.
reviews.review_text: The facilities at this college are quite good, especially when compared to nearby colleges. The computer labs, Wi-Fi, classrooms, and library are well maintained. The hostel is of good quality, but the canteen does not have enough items to purchase. There is a large area for playing various games and sports.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the faculty and the placements in this college.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure of the course and the hostel are very useful. The infrastructure of the labs and classrooms is excellent. Canteen and medical facilities are also available at all times.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with the placements and faculty.

reviews.review_heading: The in depth review of KITS college.
reviews.review_text: The food in the hostel is miserable. One day I ate at the hostel and the food was the worst and it made me feel so bad. So I ended up leaving the hostel and continuing my studies. The infrastructure is quite good and okay for the fee, and they are building a new block.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides us with all facilities like labs, classrooms, a library, etc. We have some strict rules. Our college is under CCTV surveillance. The hostel facility is available for boys and girls. They provide beds for students. The food served in the hostel is good.

reviews.review_heading: It has very good campus life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was very good. Wi-Fi was enabled. Hostel facilities were better. The food quality was not great. Drinking water was available. The food served in the mess was better.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good faculty members and placements.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are in good condition, and classrooms are better. The food quality is average.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure and I would recommend it.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. There are many types of lab equipment and you have your solar panel and water plant as well. They have very well-arranged computer labs with the most useful software for every branch. Our college is a perfect college for students.
